meaning: adj.有斑点的,如斑点般散布的,混杂的
examples: The sky was speckled with stars.
I get it from my own goat, that speckled one over there.
It's a normal skin color, the one it generally presents, is either red or brown or even grey, and it's speckled with dark spots.
We drive to a snow-speckled plateau halfway up one of his favourite peaks, the witch-hatted Romsdalshorn.
Spray from the surf speckled the windshield of his pickup truck parked on the packed sand of Plum Island.
